A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

They are making secret plans against your people;

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.
4:

the people of Edom and the Ishmaelites;

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

the people of Gebal, Ammon, and Amalek,

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

Do to them what you did to the Midianites,

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

You defeated them at Endor,

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.
11:
Do to their leaders what you did to Oreb and Zeeb;

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

who said, “We will take for our own
the land that belongs to God.”
A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.
13:
Scatter them like dust, O God,

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.
14:
As fire burns the forest,

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.
15:
chase them away with your storm

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.
16:
Cover their faces with shame, O 
LORD
,

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

May they be defeated and terrified for ever;

A Prayer for the Defeat of Israel's Enemies#Ps 83 Hebrew title: A psalm by Asaph; a song.

May they know that you alone are the 
LORD
,
supreme ruler over all the earth.

 Almighty!

's Temple.

 Almighty, my king and my God.

 God Almighty.

 is our protector and glorious king,

,

 God is saying;

1:

LORD
, and answer me,

Save me from death, because I am loyal to you;

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

You are my God, so be merciful to me;

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

Make your servant glad, O Lord,

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

Listen, 
LORD
, to my prayer;

I call to you in times of trouble,

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

There is no god like you, O Lord,

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

You are mighty and do wonderful things;

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.
11:
Teach me, 
LORD
, what you want me to do,

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

I will praise you with all my heart, O Lord my God;

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.
13:
How great is your constant love for me!

A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.
14: A Prayer for Help#Ps 86 Hebrew title: A prayer by David.

;

, I call to you for help;

Treat me according to your constant love,

125:

LORD
Obedience to the Law of the LORD
126:
, it is time for you to act,

Obedience to the Law of the LORD
127:

; 119.128 Some ancient translations all your instructions; Hebrew unclear.

131:

132:
Turn to me and have mercy on me

133:
As you have promised, keep me from falling;

Desire to Obey the Law of the LORD
134:
Save me from those who oppress me,

Desire to Obey the Law of the LORD
135:

and teach me your laws.
Desire to Obey the Law of the LORD
136:
My tears pour down like a river,

137:
You are righteous, 
LORD
,
and your laws are just.
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
138:
The rules that you have given
are completely fair and right.
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
139:
My anger burns in me like a fire,
because my enemies disregard your commands.
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
140:
How certain your promise is!
How I love it!
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
141:
I am unimportant and despised,
but I do not neglect your teachings.
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
142:
Your righteousness will last for ever,
and your law is always true.
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
143:
I am filled with trouble and anxiety,
but your commandments bring me joy.
The Justice of the Law of the LORD
144:
Your instructions are always just;
give me understanding, and I shall live.
145:
With all my heart I call to you;
answer me, 
LORD
, and I will obey your commands!
146:
I call to you;
save me, and I will keep your laws.
147:
Before sunrise I call to you for help;
I place my hope in your promise.
148:
All night long I lie awake,
to meditate on your instructions.
149:
Because your love is constant, hear me, O 
LORD
;
show your mercy, and preserve my life!
150:
My cruel persecutors are coming closer,
people who never keep your law.
151:
But you are near to me, 
LORD
,
and all your commands are permanent.
152:
Long ago I learnt about your instructions;
you made them to last for ever.
153:
Look at my suffering, and save me,
because I have not neglected your law.
154:
Defend my cause, and set me free;
save me, as you have promised.
155:
The wicked will not be saved,
for they do not obey your laws.
156:
But your compassion, 
LORD
, is great;
show your mercy and save me!
157:
I have many enemies and oppressors,
but I do not fail to obey your laws.
158:
When I look at those traitors, I am filled with disgust,
because they do not keep your commands.
159:
See how I love your instructions, 
LORD
.
Your love never changes, so save me!
160:
The heart of your law is truth,
and all your righteous judgements are eternal.
Dedication to the Law of the LORD
161:
Powerful people attack me unjustly,
but I respect your law.
Dedication to the Law of the LORD
162:
How happy I am because of your promises —

Dedication to the Law of the LORD
163:
I hate and detest all lies,

Dedication to the Law of the LORD
164:
Seven times each day I thank you
for your righteous judgements.
Dedication to the Law of the LORD
165:

Dedication to the Law of the LORD
166:
I wait for you to save me, 
LORD
,
and I do what you command.
Dedication to the Law of the LORD
167:
I obey your teachings;
I love them with all my heart.
Dedication to the Law of the LORD
168:

169:
Let my cry for help reach you, 
LORD
!
Give me understanding, as you have promised.
170:
Listen to my prayer,
and save me according to your promise!
171:
I will always praise you,
because you teach me your laws.
172:
I will sing about your law,
because your commands are just.
173:
Always be ready to help me,
because I follow your commands.
174:
How I long for your saving help, O 
LORD
!

175:

1:

, you have examined me and you know me.
